calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aaron Feldman for Jerre Rountree (Administrator).

The Court raised the issue of the proceeds from the sale of the property being deposited into the Attorney's client trust account and not being deposited into an estate interest bearing account as required. Mr. Feldman stated that he thought the funds were sufficiently secured, that he is aware it is not earning interest, that it seemed like a reasonable solution at the time, that he did it in another County and it was not an issue, and that he has learned not to do it again. Mr. Feldman also stated that it was done in good faith and in an attempt to work with the bond company restrictions and the Administrator. The Court stated that the funds could have been placed into a blocked account. Mr. Feldman stated that he filed the tax returns about a week ago and that he expects it will be processed promptly, but there is no guarantee. The Court noted that there are no objections. Mr. Feldman stated that the Beneficiary is not objecting and that the Beneficiary is in desperate need of the distribution. The Court granted the Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order), but stated that it will not be able to approve all of the activities of the Administrator and how the money was held.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aaron Feldman for Petitioner.

Mr. Feldman stated that there is no objection to the petition, that the estimated value of the Estate is $2,000,000.00 and that he prepared a revised order to set bond at $2,130,000.00. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for February 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
